title: Troubleshoot Blank Page Issue
overview: Fix blank page or screen display when overriding mashup by updating API to Service.
issue: Blank page or screen display when overriding the mashup by updating API to Service

steps.title: Compare OOB API Output and Service Output
steps.description: Most likely, the TotalNumberOfRecords attribute might be missing from the Service output. Compare both outputs to identify missing attributes.

steps.title: Add TotalNumberOfRecords to Service Template
steps.description: Add the missing TotalNumberOfRecords attribute in the service template XML output to fix the issue. Ensure the TotalNumberOfRecords element is present in your service's Output section.

steps.title: Verify the Fix
steps.description: Rebuild and test the application to ensure the blank page issue is resolved.

keyPoints: Compare OOB API output with custom Service output
Add missing attributes to service template
Always verify output structure matches expected format
commonCauses: Incorrect XML structure in service template
